use tokio::sync::mpsc;

async fn event_loop(mut rx: mpsc::Receiver<Event>) {
    loop {
        tokio::select! {
            Some(event) = rx.recv() => match event {
                Event::Request(req) => {
                    let resp = query_service(&req.url).await;
                    send_response(resp).await;
                }
                Event::Timeout => {
                    let resp = query_service("default").await;
                    send_response(resp).await;
                }
            },
        }
    }
}

async fn query_service(_url: &str) -> Response { todo!() }
async fn send_response(_resp: Response) { todo!() }
enum Event { Request(Request), Timeout }
struct Request { url: String }
struct Response;
